summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 26/08/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye showed steady trends this week, with India continuing to lead
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-08-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-16-August-22-August-2025.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-08-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-16-August-22-August-2025.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
16 August - 22 August 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye showed steady trends this week, with India continuing to lead regional activity. Buyer sentiment in
India remains positive, supported by stronger appetite and proactive purchasing, which is expected to keep the country ahead in securing available
tonnage. Bangladesh stayed relatively quiet, with limited demand due to LC challenges and falling scrap prices impacting overall interest.
